title: LinearOperatorLowRankUpdate gradient path segfaults

source.document: 基于大语言模型的深度学习库模糊测试.pdf
source.section: 附录 缺陷触发代码示例

trigger: Compute a gradient through LinearOperatorLowRankUpdate.matmul with incompatible upstream gradient shape.
expected: TensorFlow should reject incompatible gradient shape with a normal exception.
observed: The process terminates with Segmentation fault.
